title: Director Comfort Policy v1
description: Comfort and safety policy for director personas, defining per-session DET limits, cooldown ratios, and CDL spans, aligned with consent and horror intensity budget modules.

policyId.description: Stable identifier for this comfort policy.

schemaRef.description: Schema version identifier for validator binding.

objectKind.description: Object kind for CHATDIRECTOR routing and manifest validation.

tier.description: Tier in which this comfort policy is valid.

directorKind.description: Director persona kind that this policy is intended for.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this comfort policy.

maxDetPerSession.description: Maximum cumulative DET exposure permitted for a single session under this director, subject to consent caps.

requiredCooldownRatio.description: Minimum ratio of low-DET (sanctuary/ambient) time to high-DET events that the director must enforce.

lowDetMinutes.description: Required minutes (or normalized units) of low-DET segments.

highDetMinutes.description: Minutes (or normalized units) of high-DET segments that the low-DET value must cover.

allowedCdlSpan.description: Allowed CDL band for this director persona, to avoid pure noise or pure comfort.

min.description: Minimum CDL allowed for this director, respecting XMIT floors.

max.description: Maximum CDL allowed for this director.

allOf.description: Ensure cooldown ratio has a meaningful denominator when non-zero.
